remarks: An exceptional opportunity to secure a prime piece of Darien real estate. Set on a beautiful lot in one of Darien's most sought-after neighborhoods, 17 Briar Brae offers endless possibilities to renovate, expand, or build new. The existing home features three bedrooms in the main residence, plus a separate finished space above the garage complete with a bedroom, full bath, and walk-in closet-offering flexibility for guests, extended family, a home office, or future reconfiguration. Whether you choose to restore and expand the current home or explore new construction, the true value lies in the exceptional setting, generous property, and coveted location. A rare opportunity to create your dream home just minutes from downtown Darien, the train, schools, parks, and beaches. Property is being sold as-is.
